notes: USER_EMAIL (mutykovaelena@gmail.com) is an org-bound multi-org account (BMW-Group + ~30 orgs), not a personal account. ORG_USER_EMAIL credentials are stale (401/400 at /connect/token). 2 cases BLOCKED on account-type/credential constraints, not storefront defects. 4 PASS-with-note where a CSV literal assertion did not match documented design (CFG_LAPTOP defaults pre-fill; org-switch badge reflects target org's own residual cart; SMK-005 B2B invariants verified via fallback multi-org account).

testCases.notes: Homepage loads, hero/Daily-Deals above fold, nav + All-products dropdown + language selector + cart icon present; hero-area CTA navigates to PDP (no 404); browser-back returns home. Console errors = catalog product-image 404s only (data quality, not JS).

Personal sign-up completes -> /successful-registration confirmation ('check your mailbox to verify'). Registration GraphQL mutation 200. NOTE: storefront registration is email-verification-gated (no auto-login), so the CSV 'name in header' / immediate token-grant expectation reflects an older auto-login model; account WAS created. Admin parity not separately verified.

Company account type selectable; 'Company name' field appears on selecting Organization (BL-B2B-005 / ECL-4.1). Submit -> /successful-registration, org-create mutation 200. Email-verification-gated; B2B-nav/admin-org parity not verified live (cannot log in until verified).

Sign-in as USER_EMAIL succeeds, redirects off /sign-in, Account-menu button + Dashboard link + cart icon in header; /account/dashboard loads without redirect. me query 200. NOTE: USER_EMAIL is actually org-bound (BMW-Group), not a personal account.

testCases.title: Authentication - Sign In B2B Organization User
testCases.notes: Designated ORG_USER_EMAIL (test-emily.johnson-20260310@test-agent.com) credentials are STALE: form shows 'Login attempt failed. Check your credentials' and POST /connect/token -> 400. This is a test-data issue, not a storefront defect (form correctly displays the error alert = auth validation working). B2B sign-in invariants (org name in header, /company/members + /company/info no 403, no Addresses link in sidebar - ECL-14.3) were verified via the multi-org USER_EMAIL fallback. Needs ORG_USER credential refresh.

Real-user search 'coffee maker' (@td(SEARCH_KITCHEN.query)) -> /search?q=coffee+maker, 19 results, product cards with name+price, facet panel (price/Categories/Brand/Origin). All prices 2 decimals (BL-PRICE-003). products query 200.

Catalog (3,612 results) -> 'Coffee and tea' category (4 products, names+prices+facets+breadcrumb) -> first product PDP (title, SKU, price $23.00 2dp, breadcrumb, properties). NOTE: first product (DOUWE EGBERTS) was out-of-stock so showed 'Stock alert' instead of a stepper (correct OOS UX); in-stock products in the same category showed steppers. Stepper add-to-cart entry point fully validated in SMK-008.

ALCE0128 PDP: spinbutton '0', Decrease disabled at qty 0 (BL-CART-001). Increase(+) once -> qty 1, 'in Cart' badge. addItem 200, errors[] empty. /cart shows product, line $200.00 = unit x 1, subtotal $200, Total $240 ($200+$40 tax+$0 ship, BL-CHK-006).

Cart-line Increase -> qty 2, line $400.00 (= $200x2, BL-PRICE-003); Decrease -> qty 1, line $200.00, Decrease disabled at min (BL-CART-007). No duplicate line items, no negative qty. changeCartItemQuantity 200.

Cart line shows name+image+unit price+qty controls+line total; line total recalculated on +/- ($200<->$400); subtotal = sum of line totals ($200); all amounts 2 decimals; cart.total matched displayed grand total. changeCartItemQuantity 200/errors[] empty.
Remove-from-cart (trash) -> 'Your cart is empty', subtotal effectively $0.00 (empty). removeCartItem 200/errors[] empty; product gone from cart.items.

Delivery (Shipping) selected, valid US address (saved Los Angeles), Fixed Rate (Ground) -> Shipping $150.00 (non-zero). Subtotal $200 + Shipping $150 + Tax $70 - Disc $0 = Total $420.00 (BL-CHK-006). addOrUpdateCartShipment 200; cart.shipments[0] deliveryAddress+shipmentMethodCode populated.

testCases.title: Checkout - Place Order and Confirm
testCases.notes: CRITICAL GATE. Single-click Place Order -> /checkout/completed, order CO260602-00018 in CO[digits] format (BL-ORD-005). createOrderFromCart 200, orderId non-null. Confirmation total $420 matches cart. Cart cleared (BL-CROSS-005). Order detail (SMK-016) totals match.

testCases.title: Payment - Credit Card Authorization
testCases.notes: CRITICAL GATE. CyberSource embedded Microform on /cart: Card-number + Security-code cross-origin iframes filled via snapshot refs (.contentFrame()), Cardholder + Expiration DOM inputs. Microform v2 bundle + iframes loaded 200. 'Place order' transitioned disabled->enabled only after all 4 fields filled (BL-CHK-002 gate). Single click -> order created (CO260602-00018). authorizePayment succeeded (order created).

testCases.title: GA4 Purchase Event
testCases.notes: dataLayer (gtag array form) had exactly 1 'purchase' event: transaction_id = order id fceb25d8-... (matches /account/orders/<id>), value 200 (positive), items[] non-empty, full funnel fired (view_cart->begin_checkout->add_shipping_info->add_payment_info->place_order->purchase). Page refresh fired NO second purchase event (ECL-11.1, no duplicate).

/account/orders top row = CO260602-00018, 6/2/2026, $420.00 (matches confirmation). Order detail: coffee... Animal Crossing $200 qty1, Subtotal $200, Total $420, Ground $150, CyberSource, billing+shipping addr. orders query + detail items[] non-empty, totals match (BL-ORD-005). Status 'Payment required' (CyberSource sandbox Decision-Manager hold, normal).

testCases.title: Account - Address Management (VCST-4802 Regression)
testCases.notes: Precondition unmet: 'Addresses' feature is personal-account-only. USER_EMAIL is org-bound (BMW-Group); navigating to /account/addresses redirects to /account/dashboard (documented ECL-14.3 org-isolation behavior - not a defect; org users manage addresses via /company/info). VCST-4802 address add/edit regression cannot be exercised on this account; needs a true personal account.

CFG_LAPTOP: 2 required Product sections (RAM*, Storage*) with defaults pre-filled, so 'Add to cart' ENABLED at load. NOTE: CSV 'disabled before required filled' assertion is N/A for CFG_LAPTOP by documented design (defaults pre-fill; the BL-CAT-006 gate is exercised on CFG_RING/SMK-032). Option switch updated price live; cart line 'Components list' shows configured options (RAM-32GB / 256GB SSD - selectedConfiguration preserved, BL-CART-010). addItem 200.
CFG_LAPTOP price updated $1,099.00 -> $1,249.00 instantly (no reload) on RAM 16GB->32GB switch; 2 decimals; P2 != P1 (BL-PRICE-001/003).

testCases.title: B2B - Org Switcher and Cart Isolation
testCases.notes: Cart isolation correct (BL-B2B-001). Added Animal Crossing under BMW-Group; switched to 'Coffee shop' -> header org updated (BL-CROSS-008), cart showed Coffee shop's OWN residual item (16inch TV $493), NOT the Animal Crossing -> no cross-org contamination. Switched back to BMW-Group -> Animal Crossing restored. NOTE: cart badge was non-zero after switch only because Coffee shop had a pre-existing cart from prior testing, not carryover; the literal 'badge=0' expectation didn't hold but the critical invariant (no contamination) passed both ways.

/company/members loads (no 403), heading 'Company members', 16 members with roles/emails/status (BL-B2B-005). /company/info loads, 'Company info' heading + Company name + Addresses table. No 'Addresses' link in account User sidebar (org user, ECL-14.3).
/bulk-order loads, heading 'Bulk order pad', Copy&Paste tab default with SKU,Quantity textarea + Manually tab. Typed 'ALCE0128,1' -> 'Add to cart' + 'Reset' enabled (SKU validated, BL-B2B-005).

Full E2E: search 'coffee maker' -> first result PDP (0.6L Electric Drip, $155.00 2dp) -> Increase(+) -> /cart shows same product, matching name+price $155.00, line $155.00 = unit x 1. addItem 200/errors[] empty.

/cart: both Delivery + Pickup visible. Pickup -> 'Pick points' modal listed 50+ FFCs (Brooklyn Academy of Music, Queens Crossing, etc. - BL-BOPIS-001), with map + country/state/city filters. Selected location -> Shipping cost $0.00 (BL-BOPIS-002). Total $186 = $155 + $0 ship + $31 tax (BL-CHK-006). addOrUpdateCartShipment(fulfillmentCenterId) 200. (50 console warnings = Google Maps markers, benign.)

testCases.title: XSS Regression - Profile (VCST-4803)
testCases.notes: Profile name saved ('SmokeTest RunnerQA') as plain text, no alert(), no script execution, no unexpected redirect, no 5xx (VCST-4803). updateContact succeeded. Only console error = benign electro2.json 404 theme preset. Shipment-address XSS (VCST-4804) covered indirectly: checkout address flow in SMK-012 had no alert/XSS. Profile-name cleanup (restore to 'Runner') did not register due to Vue dirty-state on fill() - non-blocking, value is a harmless test string.

/account/dashboard, /account/orders, /catalog, /cart all loaded with content; each only 1 console error = benign electro2.json 404 (theme preset asset). No TypeError/ReferenceError, no 5xx, no layout-breaking JS/CSS 404 (BL-CROSS-011).

Homepage: language-selector-button data-test-id resolves (new PR #2234 flat selector), dropdown opens with 15 languages, top-header present. New flat selectors (account-button, email-input, language-selector-button, sign-out-button, place-order-button, clear-cart-button) all resolved throughout the run = PR #2234 rename deployed. Deprecated 'main-layout.top-header.*' prefix absence inferred from all-new-selectors-resolve (not DOM-scripted per real-user rule).

/sign-in: email-input + password-input + login-button data-test-ids resolved (used in SMK-004/005 fills). Error alert rendered on failed ORG_USER login ('Login attempt failed') = new flat-selector convention deployed. Sign-in form functional after rename.

'Ship to' header control rendered (BL-SHIP-001), picker opened (no 404/blank) with 3 saved addresses + Add-new. Selected Budapest -> header label updated 'Los Angeles' -> 'BUdapest 1, budapest...'. Persisted to /cart (label still Budapest, ECL-7.1). No 4xx/5xx, no TypeError. Restored to Los Angeles.

testCases.title: BOPIS E2E Pickup Order
testCases.notes: Coffee maker in cart, Pickup + FFC '30 Lafayette Ave', billing address set (BL-BOPIS-006), CyberSource Microform filled (iframes via refs). Single-click Place Order -> /checkout/completed, order CO260602-00019 (CO[digits], BL-ORD-005). Order detail: Shipping method 'Pickup in store ($0.00)' (BL-BOPIS-002), Pick-up address = FFC NOT delivery address (BL-BOPIS-001), Subtotal $155, Total $186 = $155 + $0 ship + $31 tax (BL-CHK-006). createOrderFromCart 200. Cart cleared (BL-CROSS-005).
testCases.businessRule: BL-BOPIS-001, BL-BOPIS-002, BL-BOPIS-006, BL-CHK-002, BL-CHK-006, BL-ORD-005, BL-CROSS-005

sections.3_Authentication: SMK-004 PASS; SMK-005 BLOCKED (stale ORG_USER creds, B2B invariants verified via fallback)
sections.9_Orders: SMK-016 PASS (SMK-033 out of track scope)
sections.13_ConfigurableProducts: SMK-018, SMK-019 PASS (SMK-031/032 out of track scope)

sections.2_Registration_Admin: PARTIAL - reg mutations 200; Admin-SPA parity not separately verified (email-verification-gated) - SMK-002/003

bugs.title: Missing theme-preset asset electro2.json returns 404 site-wide
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Sign in. 2. Load /account/dashboard (or any authenticated page). 3. Observe console.
bugs.impact: No functional/layout impact observed; pages render and interact normally. Cosmetic/config cleanup (missing theme preset file).

bugs.title: Homepage product-image assets 404 (catalog data quality)
bugs.expected: Daily Deals / popular product images load.
bugs.impact: Cosmetic (broken thumbnails for specific products); not a JS error, no interaction impact. Likely stale catalog image references from the 2026-05-15 catalog restore.

dataIssues: ORG_USER_EMAIL (test-emily.johnson-20260310@test-agent.com) credentials are stale -> /connect/token 400. Blocks SMK-005 designated path. Refresh credentials or re-seed the org user.

USER_EMAIL (mutykovaelena@gmail.com) is an organization-bound multi-org account, not a personal account -> blocks personal-only features (SMK-017 Addresses). Suite 042 assumes USER_DEFAULT is a personal account; consider a dedicated personal account for SMK-017 or remap.
USER_EMAIL profile name left as 'SmokeTest RunnerQA' (cleanup restore did not register due to Vue dirty-state on programmatic fill); harmless test string, no XSS.
consoleErrorsSummary: Across all pages the recurring console errors were exclusively: (a) catalog product-image 404s (data quality), and (b) /assets/presets/electro2.json 404 (theme preset). No TypeError/ReferenceError, no CSP violations, no payment-script/CORS errors. CyberSource Microform iframes loaded clean.
